title: I Want You
tmdbOverview: After two years away, Hache returns to Barcelona seeking a fresh start. Falling for Gin while facing unresolved feelings for Babi, he must confront love, loss, and who he's becoming.
synopsis: I Want You is a 2012 drama and romance film from Spain. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 12 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
